title: Swedenhielms
writer: Hjalmar Bergman, Stina Bergman, Gustaf Molander
actors: Gösta Ekman, Björn Berglund, Håkan Westergren
plot: The Swedenhielms is an old aristocratic family. The head of the family is professor Rolf Swedenhielm. His three children Bo, Julia and Rolf Jr also live in the house. They also have an excellent house maid, Boman. Because of the f...
